race.description: William Hill Each Way Extra Challenge Series Handicap Hurdle (0-100) (Div 2)
race.comment: JAADIL (4) has been absent since a 6L second at Sligo last October. Seems to relish better ground so likely been saved for a summer campaign and this looks an ideal starting point. May prove hard to beat. GINO BELLA (1) runs third up and should now be primed to strike. Went close both those starts so looks near a win and will relish this extra distance. Key player. CHEMDAWG (15) encountered one when 6L second at Limerick. Clearly in good form though and can improve further. Expect a bold showing. HIDALGO DES MOTTES (7) hit the frame at Thurles on last hurdles start. Is a long-standing maiden but does have the ability to break through should things fall right. Each way hope.
